results.title: Tango: Interactive walkthroughs, created in seconds. | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.5

Based on 14 reviews

Review Tango?

Reviewers mostly praise Tango as a fast, practical way to create step-by-step tutorials, customer help docs, and internal process guides. They repeatedly say it saves time, is easy to edit, and makes it simple to share image-rich walkthroughs by link, with one user highlighting the Guidance feature for surfacing relevant workflows on the right webpage. Feedback is not uniformly positive, though: one reviewer reports confusing per-user billing and slow responses around an unexpected charge, while another still wants features that make workflows faster.

•1 review

No other service like Tango exists, and they are indeed the best. It saves me so much time so I can do what really matters. They must have some geniuses and master coders because the system is not only intuitive and beautiful, but really thinks of every single thing you could wish for. The new feature, Guidance, even links to each webpage you use and tells you how many Workflows apply (so you don't have to go searching). Talk about well-thought-out work. I am so impressed and tell everyone I know about Tango.

results.title: Layerpath: Create interactive demos in minutes. | Product Hunt
results.content:
5.0

Based on 7 reviews

Review Layerpath?

Layerpath is praised for its simplicity and effectiveness in creating interactive demos, walkthroughs, and guides. Users appreciate its straightforward Chrome plugin and intuitive interface, which allows for quick and easy demo creation. Many reviewers highlight its ability to improve efficiency, collaboration, and productivity, making it a valuable tool for both personal and professional use. The platform's features, such as Playlist, Lead Forms, and Analytics, are noted for enhancing user engagement and providing valuable insights. Overall, Layerpath is highly recommended for its ease of use and functionality.

results.title: Floik Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
surprising as it is launch day, but a quick small research over founder and maker @vartika\_bansal1 plus the fact that a good morning starts in the morning make me confident that this was not an exceptional occurrence. And after all, I can only base my review on my experience and because of that I give support a 5 stars. Floik offer you several templates to create your demos and guides: Interactive Demo, a Step by Step Guide, a Screen Only Video, a Screen + Camera Video and a Camera Only Video. Each of them comes with an explanatory videos and instructions and almost each process itself is really intuitive and well executed. Processing quality is really good, AI voice overs work well, and at job done you have 3 options to share/publish your creation: share its link hosted on Floik, embed [...] Subscribe

# Floik Reviews [...] your creation: share its link hosted on Floik, embed a few linhes of HTML5 code on your blogs or pages, download your video and do whatever you want with it (this option will only be available to paid tiers customers once current promotion has ended - I have asked support about it). You might have notives that I used the word ALMOST above. Unfortunately I have encountered several flows with the Interactive Demo Template. Be them due to me not grasping the needed steps or to true poor design, I'd suggest the team to take action one way (improve guide about it) or the other (fix the flow). Here is what I have experienced with that particular template: - when I record my screen, I can only stop recording and when I do what was recorded starts getting processed immediately. This is great,
